description: Real-world: k8s node memory pressure creates 4 alerts across different pods. All from one root cause. Should form 1 cluster.

alerts.text: Kubelet evicted pod default/api-server-7d9f8b: node MemoryPressure=True. Available memory 312Mi, below threshold 500Mi.
Pod default/worker-6c4d9b in CrashLoopBackOff: container OOMKilled, exit code 137. Node memory pressure event.
Kubernetes node condition MemoryPressure changed to True. 7 pods evicted in last 10 minutes. Node ready=False.
Java application OOMKilled in container: container exceeded memory limit 2Gi. Kubernetes eviction controller triggered. Pod restarting.
